name: Main City Park
description: Main City Park is a place to play pickleball in Elko, NV. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Southside Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Southside Park Tennis Courts in Elko, NV! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: West Wendover Nevada
description: West Wendover Nevada is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Wendover, NV. The court surface is clay. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
